title: API RPC Logic Schema
description: Schema for the api_rpc logic type in Corezoid processes (Call Process)

type.description: Specifies this is a Call Process (RPC) logic block

err_node_id.description: ID of the node for error handling

extra.description: Parameters to pass to the called process

group.description: Call parameter mode used by the UI: "all" sends all task parameters to the called process; empty string sends only extra/extra_type fields

conv_id.description: ID of the target Process to call, or a dynamic reference like '{{param1}}' or '@{{aliasName}}'

convTitle.description: Title of the target Process to call

obj_to_id.description: Not typically used for standard calls

is_sync.description: Whether to wait for the called process to complete (synchronous call)

user_id.description: Optional user ID to associate with the called process
